event: NPP designated as a List I chemical.
ANPP controlled as an immediate precursor.
ANPP and NPP entered into force in Table I of 1988 Convention.
Mexico trade/sanitary controls include ANPP and NPP (effective day after publication).
China controls on ANPP and NPP effective 1 Feb 2018.
source_title: DEA press release on China ANPP/NPP controls

event: China class-based control of fentanyl-related substances effective 1 May 2019 (captures benzylfentanyl by structure).
source_title: UNODC legal response note: China class control of fentanyl-related substances (Apr 2019 announcement)

event: Benzylfentanyl and 4-anilinopiperidine designated as List I chemicals.
Norfentanyl controlled as an immediate precursor.
Mexico CSG watchlist expansion for dual-use substances (effective day after publication).
4-AP, 1-BOC-4-AP, and norfentanyl entered into force in Table I of 1988 Convention.
1-BOC-4-AP specifically listed as a controlled List I chemical.
Broad fallback: 2023 anti-fentanyl reform package covering precursor control regime.
4-piperidone (including carbamates such as 1-BOC-4-piperidone) designated as List I chemical.
DEA Special Surveillance List update (restriction/monitoring expansion).
Halides of 4-anilinopiperidine controlled as List I chemicals.
CND voted to place 4-piperidone and 1-BOC-4-piperidone under international control.
source_title: INCB press release on 67th CND fentanyl precursor decisions

event: China scheduling of 4-AP, 1-BOC-4-AP, and norfentanyl effective 1 Sep 2024.
source_title: White House fact sheet (US-China Counternarcotics Working Group)

event: DEA Special Surveillance List update adding additional fentanyl pre-precursors.
China domestic controls include 4-piperidone and 1-BOC-4-piperidone effective 20 Jul 2025.
source_title: INCB update on China's domestic controls

event: Broad fallback: China class-II controls over fentanyl-related precursor chemicals.
source_title: INCB update on China's domestic controls
